intent: Run the full IDT xGEN library prep - do the end repair and A-tailing steps, then ligate adapters, clean up with beads and ethanol washes, add barcodes and run PCR, then do two more bead cleanups to get the final libraries. The robot handles all the heating, magnetic separation, and liquid transfers automatically for up to 24 samples.

commands.message: THIS IS A NO MODULE RUN
THIS PROTOCOL WILL REUSE TIPS FOR WASHES
SETTING THERMO and TEMP BLOCK Temperature
